{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Herald’s Remnant
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A [[Herald’s Remnant]] is locked inside a separate prison within the castle.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Herald’s Remnant]] is a [[dragon]] of living [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
